summary: Complete UI Metamorphosis system deployed - Ship-AI interface evolves with gameplay progression

components_created.description: 11 resource types with metadata, cost curves, pricing models
25+ unlock flags, upgrade definitions, tech tree structure
Zustand store with 15+ actions, persistent save system, flag management
XState machine: 6 UI phases, milestone triggers, consciousness awakening
Theme evolution container, holographic effects, status bar
Dev/Play mode switching, progressive panel unlocks, ghost previews
8 curve types, batch purchasing, affordability checking
Dynamic tooltips, cost previews, resource metadata display
Initial recovery interface, resource display, upgrade system
Advanced manufacturing interface, batch operations, detailed previews
Interactive terminal with 10+ commands, parsing, execution

metamorphosis_phases.description: Ship-AI boots at 0.7% capacity, basic recovery interface
Basic UI protocols restored, tooltips enabled
Nanobot foundry operational, dramatic UI transformation

integration_points.impact: Main game interface replaced with evolving system

integration_points.description: New Ship-AI interface with progressive evolution

lore_integration.progression: Each upgrade physically repairs the AI's interface systems
lore_integration.narrative: UI improvements are diegetic - you're literally fixing the ship's brain
milestones: First nanobot construction triggers holographic display matrix
Signal uplink enables deep system scans and ghost previews
Terminal interface becomes interactive as AI regains communication protocols

technical_specifications.theme_system: Dynamic CSS classes based on unlock flags
technical_specifications.save_system: Automatic persistence with partial state optimization

verification_commands: Navigate to /game to see Ship-AI interface
Collect SCRAP and ENERGY (auto-generated every few seconds)
Purchase 'Crash Recovery Protocol' to unlock tooltips
Purchase 'Bootstrap Fabricator' to unlock cost previews
Purchase 'Nanobot Threading' to trigger holographic transformation
Use terminal commands: status, inv, buy nano_thread, flags
next_expansions: NodeWeave panel with React Flow integration
SynthBay panel with Tone.js audio synthesis
CYOA storylet system for narrative branches

compatibility.non_breaking: All existing routes and components untouched
compatibility.additive_only: No modifications to existing game logic
